name: @app/eslint-config
//: Shared ESLint flat config package (ESM, hence type:module). No build step — it ships raw .mjs flat-config files. `main`/`exports` point at index.mjs (the base config); the `./node` subpath adds Node globals for backend packages. Apps depend on this via workspace:* and spread the relevant export in their own eslint.config.mjs.
